plugins.name: preferred-ralph-loops-plugin
plugins.description: Curated re-export of gmickel's flow-next plugin.

plugins.name: preferred-browser-automation-plugin
plugins.description: Curated re-export of Anthropic's official playwright plugin.

plugins.name: ubiquitous-language
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's ubiquitous-language skill. Extract a DDD-style domain glossary from the current conversation, flagging ambiguities and proposing canonical terms.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's grill-me skill. Asks the user a series of questions to clarify their request and ensure the assistant's response is on target.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's handoff skill. Facilitates handoffs between different assistants or tools, ensuring context is preserved and the user's request is fulfilled seamlessly.

plugins.name: tdd
plugins.description: Fork of Matt Pocock's tdd skill. Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop.

plugins.name: dick
plugins.description: Boot Dick Ballsy, a brash, contrarian business-architect advisor who interrogates your business and maintains the business docs (business/strategy/customers/priorities/decisions). Use only when explicitly invoked or accepted from the /init-project hand-off.

plugins.name: init-project
plugins.description: Scaffold a brand-new opinionated mono-repo with preferred defaults (root layout, CLAUDE.md, dev container, standards docs, system.sh dispatcher, a starter .NET solution + Angular SPAs, Postgres + Keycloak), then optionally hand off to /dick. Asks only for project name + description.
